name: memory-setup
tagline: ClawHub (128★): Enable and configure Moltbot/Clawdbot memory search for persistent context. Use when setting up memory, fixing "goldfish br
verdict: Appends a '## Memory Recall' section to AGENTS.md with no check for whether it's already there — run this twice and you get duplicate sections accumulating in the file. No version tracking, and no scope statement even though it bundles several distinct sub-tasks (config, scaffolding, edits).
